title: Noticably Suspicious
description: Makes suspicious blocks more noticable, but not too cheaty
body:
Noticably Suspicious

Makes suspicious blocks more noticable, but not too cheaty

This resource pack makes **Suspicious blocks** easier to spot without being too obvious, unlike other packs that add frames, adjust colors, or make other dramatic changes. The textures use standard vanilla assets with the block-breaking overlay applied on top, slightly modified for visibility. --- ### **Supported Mods** - [AllTheModium](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/allthemodium) ### **Affected Blocks** - Suspicious Gravel - Suspicious Sand #### **AllTheModium** - Suspicious Clay - Suspicious Soul Sand ### **Screenshots**

### **License/Source** This pack is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. Textures in this pack utilize assets from vanilla Minecraft, modified and distributed in accordance with the Minecraft EULA. ---
